title: lathyrus japonicus f. albescens
intro: Lathyrus japonicus f. albescens, also known as the Japanese white peavine, is a flowering plant species in the legume family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of menopause, and supporting kidney function. Lathyrus japonicus f. albescens can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
